subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Thou hast become aware of the nature of the Divine Beauty and art informed of the sanctity of the Ancient Being. Convey thou these tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز من تو از سجیه جمال احدیه مطلع شدی و از تقدیس ذات قدم باخبر اخبار کن
subcodes.subjects: @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation
